# FrequencyWords English frequency data

`en_50k.txt` is an unmodified copy of the English 50,000-word frequency list
from the [FrequencyWords project](https://github.com/hermitdave/FrequencyWords).
It was generated from the OpenSubtitles 2018 corpus and is distributed by that
project under the
[Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).

- Source: `content/2018/en/en_50k.txt`
- Upstream author: Hermit Dave and FrequencyWords contributors
- Retrieved: 2026-07-23
- SHA-256: `5351ff405b1126ef555791dd4d9798a48e3e9a501a9fc481a9da957752cfb458`
